text.tspan: The product feels like entering a curiosity game, while configuration stays quietly available.
Bring a question. Your guide will research it and open two surprising paths.
Where does a city keep its memories?
When does a shortcut become a road?
Sage notices the patterns connecting your question to a bigger story.
“Let’s widen the frame just enough to see what this is connected to.”
Live web research · sources included · Smart setup
Nothing starts in the background. You’ll watch the research unfold.
The landing page is the lobby
More are one playful swipe away.
Mobile: question → swipeable guide carousel → selected guide’s one-line audition → launch
